raise_justifications.desktop/macos/Desktop/Sources/FloatingCo: Agent completion presentation now follows the canonical terminal lifecycle used by PTT and chat.
Onboarding bar glow, the reach-error card (Retry/Skip), and the notch hover/voice surface-state boundary render on the shared bar surface.
Reach-error state lives with the owning manager; savePreChatCenterIfNeeded snaps to the full stored restore frame so the pill no longer drifts per re-open cycle.
Strict concurrency annotations (Ticket 14) add Sendable conformances and isolation qualifiers without changing runtime behavior.
